title: ITR Filing Checklist
description: A comprehensive checklist of all documents and information required for income tax return filing across ITR-1, ITR-2, ITR-3, and ITR-4. Covers salary, house property, capital gains, business income, and deductions under Chapter VI-A. Includes AIS/26AS verification steps and common mistakes to avoid.
emailSubject: Request for ITR Filing Checklist - DRSPV & Associates
emailBody:
Hi,

I would like to receive the ITR Filing Checklist from DRSPV & Associates. Please share the PDF at your earliest convenience.

Thank you.

title: Old vs New Tax Regime Comparison Guide
description: A detailed side-by-side comparison of the old and new income tax regimes for FY 2025-26, including slab rates, eligible deductions, break-even analysis at different income levels, and a decision framework to help taxpayers choose the most beneficial regime. Includes worked-out examples for salaried and business individuals.
emailSubject: Request for Old vs New Tax Regime Guide - DRSPV & Associates
emailBody:
Hi,

I would like to receive the Old vs New Tax Regime Comparison Guide from DRSPV & Associates. Please share the PDF at your earliest convenience.

Thank you.

title: GST Compliance Calendar 2025-26
description: A month-by-month calendar of all GST filing deadlines for FY 2025-26, covering GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, GSTR-9, CMP-08, and IFF. Includes separate timelines for monthly and quarterly (QRMP) filers, e-invoice requirements, and a quick reference for late fee and interest calculations.
emailSubject: Request for GST Compliance Calendar 2025-26 - DRSPV & Associates
emailBody:
Hi,

I would like to receive the GST Compliance Calendar for FY 2025-26 from DRSPV & Associates. Please share the PDF at your earliest convenience.

Thank you.

title: IPO Readiness Checklist
description: A step-by-step guide for companies planning an IPO in India, covering SEBI ICDR eligibility criteria, financial statement requirements (Ind-AS restated financials), corporate governance prerequisites, DRHP preparation, ESOP restructuring considerations, and post-listing compliance under LODR Regulations.
emailSubject: Request for IPO Readiness Checklist - DRSPV & Associates
emailBody:
Hi,

I would like to receive the IPO Readiness Checklist from DRSPV & Associates. Our company is exploring the possibility of going public and this guide would be very helpful.

Thank you.

title: NRI Tax & FEMA Quick Guide
description: An essential guide for NRIs covering residential status determination under Section 6, taxation of Indian income, DTAA benefits, NRE/NRO/FCNR account rules, property purchase and sale provisions, LRS limits, Form 15CA/15CB requirements, and key FEMA compliance obligations for overseas Indians.
emailSubject: Request for NRI Tax & FEMA Quick Guide - DRSPV & Associates
emailBody:
Hi,

I am an NRI and would like to receive the NRI Tax & FEMA Quick Guide from DRSPV & Associates. Please share the PDF at your earliest convenience.

Thank you.

title: Tax Notice Response Guide
description: A practical guide to understanding and responding to common income tax notices including Section 143(1) intimations, Section 143(2) scrutiny, Section 148 reassessment, and CPC demand notices. Covers response timelines, rectification procedures under Section 154, appeal filing under Section 246A, and tips for effective communication with the department.
emailSubject: Request for Tax Notice Response Guide - DRSPV & Associates
emailBody:
Hi,

I have received a tax notice and would like to understand my options. Please share the Tax Notice Response Guide from DRSPV & Associates.

Thank you.
